query:
insert into TestRunRevisions (
                        last_collect_nr,
                        product_id,
                        test_run_name,
                        test_run_date,
                        revision,
                        comment
                    )
                    values (
                        $1,
                        $2,
                        $3,
                        $4,
                        $5,
                        $6
                    )
                    on conflict (product_id, test_run_name, test_run_date, revision)
                    do update set
                        last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                        comment = excluded.comment
